reviews.comment:
Richard Waine did a great job bringing out my best looks and took the time to be sure it was right. Richard is a perfectionist and once we were done he was able to show me all the flaws in my previous headshots that will not be in his. I can’t wait to get my final cleaned up images and put them to use.
Really great job and highly recommend!!
